spec_match.rationale: Generates WGSL shaders using subgroup builtins (subgroup_invocation_id, subgroup_size) and operations (subgroupBallot).

interactive.rationale: Controls for selecting subgroup operations, generates real WGSL shader code.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a shader builder for subgroup operations; delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers common operations but could show compilation failure on unsupported hardware.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: shader generation works, clean output. No console errors.
